title: Codereview pass 3: Frame validation
description:
Crypto + Efficiency + Elegance review:

Crypto (review-crypto.md):
- Validation at protocol boundary (from_bytes receives untrusted bytes) - correct
- Length validated before any indexing/slicing - correct
- No panic reachable from malformed input - FrameError raised instead

Efficiency:
- No unnecessary allocations
- Validation is O(1)

Elegance:
- _SIGNATURE_LENGTH constant duplicates link_layer.py's SIGNATURE_LENGTH, but this is deliberate module isolation (frame.py is self-contained)
- SECURITY comment explains intent, not just what

Test quality:
- test_signature_present_but_payload_too_short uses hand-computed hex oracle, independent of encoder
close_reason: Frame validation review - existing code is correct
